reasoning: We need to focus on improving your lactate clearance and aerobic base to better handle the 25W drop over your power curve. Linking this ride to your performance on Emigration Canyon will help prepare for the sustained efforts on the Alpine Loop. Your last ride was low intensity, so this session will stress the specific limiter areas, helping to gain endurance and fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (5 minutes at 242W, 5 minutes at 218W), followed by 3 minutes recovery at 192W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
